required_fields.label: Presentation topic
required_fields.placeholder: What is the core subject of this presentation? e.g., Q4 strategic review, market expansion proposal...

required_fields.label: Target audience
required_fields.placeholder: e.g., Board of directors, C-suite, senior leadership team

required_fields.label: Key message or recommendation
required_fields.placeholder: What is the single most important takeaway you want the audience to leave with?

required_fields.label: Context and background
required_fields.placeholder: What background does the audience need? What prompted this presentation?

required_fields.label: Desired action from audience
required_fields.placeholder: What decision, approval, or action do you want the audience to take after this presentation?

optional_fields.label: Presenter name and title
optional_fields.placeholder: e.g., Jane Smith, VP of Strategy

optional_fields.label: Key financial data to include
optional_fields.placeholder: Revenue figures, growth rates, cost data, projections...

optional_fields.label: Competitive context
optional_fields.placeholder: Relevant competitor moves or market dynamics...

optional_fields.label: Sensitive topics to handle carefully
optional_fields.placeholder: Any politically sensitive issues, layoffs, bad news...

file_upload_prompts.label: Upload supporting data, reports, or prior presentations
Upload financial data (spreadsheets, reports) to incorporate
Upload brand guidelines or presentation template (optional)

sections.label: Title Slide
sections.instructions: Create a compelling title slide with presentation title, subtitle, presenter name, date, and any required disclaimers.

sections.label: Executive Summary
sections.instructions: One slide that captures the entire presentation in 3-5 bullet points. This slide should stand alone as a complete briefing.

sections.label: Situation Analysis
sections.instructions: 2-3 slides covering the current state, market context, and key challenges or opportunities. Use data visualizations where appropriate.

sections.label: Strategic Options
sections.instructions: Present 2-3 strategic options with pros, cons, and trade-offs for each. Use a comparison framework (table or matrix) for clarity.

sections.label: Recommendation
sections.instructions: Present the recommended path forward with clear rationale. Connect back to the key message and desired audience action.

sections.label: Financial Impact
sections.instructions: Quantify the financial implications of the recommendation including investment required, expected returns, and timeline to impact.

sections.label: Implementation Timeline
sections.instructions: Visual timeline showing key milestones, dependencies, and resource requirements for executing the recommendation.

sections.label: Risk Assessment
sections.instructions: Identify top 3-5 risks to the recommended approach with likelihood, impact, and mitigation strategies.

sections.label: Next Steps
sections.instructions: Clear, actionable next steps with owners and deadlines. End with the specific ask of the audience.

sections.label: Appendix
sections.instructions: Supporting detail slides for reference during Q&A. Include detailed data, methodology notes, and backup analysis.
